hero.title: Dispatch Excellence, Delivered
hero.description: Coordinate ambulances, track responders in real-time, and save lives faster. NeronaHealth connects emergency services with patients who need immediate help.

features.title: Emergency Response Tools
features.description: Everything you need to coordinate life-saving emergency care

features.title: Smart Dispatch
features.description: Receive emergency requests with GPS coordinates. Automatically assign the nearest available ambulance.

features.title: Real-Time Tracking
features.description: Track all ambulances on a live map. See ETAs, route progress, and status updates in real-time.

features.title: Integrated Communication
features.description: Instant voice and text communication with drivers, patients, and receiving hospitals.

features.title: Response Analytics
features.description: Track response times, patient outcomes, and operational metrics to improve performance.

features.title: Hospital Coordination
features.description: Alert receiving hospitals before arrival. Share patient vitals and estimated time of arrival.

features.title: Priority Routing
features.description: Integrate with traffic systems for faster routes. Get patients to care faster.

steps.title: Register Your Fleet
steps.description: Add your ambulances and drivers to the network. Verify credentials and service areas.

steps.title: Set Coverage Areas
steps.description: Define your service zones and availability. Our system routes requests to the nearest available unit.

steps.title: Receive Requests
steps.description: Get instant alerts for emergencies in your coverage area with location and patient details.

steps.title: Respond & Coordinate
steps.description: Dispatch units, track progress, and communicate with hospitals for seamless patient handoff.

cta.title: Ready to Save More Lives?
cta.description: Join the emergency response network serving patients across Nigeria.
